log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 44/67
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 44/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
